name: Celery Sukiyaki
recipeIngredient: 2 small Onions, sliced, separated into rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the steak into thin diagonal slices. For easier slicing, partially freeze first.
2. In a large skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of oil.
3. Add the steak strips, a few at a time, and brown on both sides. Remove and set aside.
4. Add celery and onion to the skillet. Saute for 3 minutes in 1 tablespoon of oil.
5. Dissolve the bouillon cube in water.
6. Add the mixture to the skillet along with water chestnuts, soy sauce, ginger, and black pepper. Stir well.
7. Add the browned steak; spoon any juices over the steak.
8. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes or until the steak and vegetables are fork tender.
9. Serve over rice.
